beta.bar: ToMenu is currently in early access beta
hero.title:
Je to TO menu
ktoré potrebuješ.
hero.tagline: ToMenu brings every restaurant's daily lunch menu into one app. Advanced filters, GPS sorting, privacy-first, completely free and ad-free.
feat.label: why tomenu
feat.title: Everything you need to pick lunch.
feat.gps.title: GPS sorted
feat.gps.desc: Restaurants sorted by distance from you. Closest first, always.
feat.search.title: Dish search
feat.search.desc: Search for a specific dish across all restaurants at once.
feat.filter.title: Advanced filters
feat.filter.desc: Filter by price, weight, allergens, delivery. Sort by best price-to-portion ratio.
feat.delivery.title: Delivery aware
feat.delivery.desc: Know which restaurants deliver before you open the menu.
feat.privacy.title: Privacy first
feat.privacy.desc: No tracking, no ads, no mandatory account. Everything opt-in. Self-hostable.
feat.week.title: Full week
feat.week.desc: Browse Monday's menu on a Wednesday. Plan ahead, not just today.
how.label: how it works
how.title: Open. Search. Eat.
step1.title: Open the app
step1.desc: No sign-up required. Guest mode works from day one. Your location sorts nearby restaurants automatically.
step2.title: Browse or search
step2.desc: Scroll through today's menus or search a specific dish. Filter by price, allergens, or delivery.
step3.title: Tap and go
step3.desc: Tap an address to open in Maps. Call the restaurant directly. Done.
dl.label: download
dl.title: Get ToMenu
dl.p: Currently in early access beta. Android APK available directly — no Play Store needed.
dl.box_p: Download and install directly. Enable "Install from unknown sources" in your Android settings if prompted.
dl.note: Latest release on GitHub · Android 8.0+ required
priv.label: privacy
priv.title: We mean it when we say privacy-first.
priv.1: No ads, ever. Not in the app, not in the API.
priv.2: No account required. Guest mode works for everything.
priv.3: All data sharing is opt-in and clearly labelled.
priv.4: Fully open source. MIT licensed. Inspect everything.
priv.5: Self-hostable. Run your own backend, keep all data local.
priv.6: Delete your account and all data anytime, instantly.
api.label: for developers
api.title: There's a REST API too.
api.p: ToMenu exposes all menu data via a clean JSON API. Build Telegram bots, office lunch tools, integrations — whatever you want. Keys are free during beta.
